instructions: Write your email using all the notes.

task.subject: Trip to the museum
task.initialEmail: Hi,||Our class is going to the museum next Tuesday. [1]Are you excited about the trip?[/1]||[2]The teacher says we have to bring lunch. What are you going to take?[/2]||[3]Would you like to sit next to me on the coach?[/3] It will take about an hour to get there.||[4]Do you want to do the worksheet together at the museum?[/4]||See you tomorrow||Ruby

sampleAnswer.text: Hi Ruby,||Thanks for writing. [1]Yes, I’m really excited about the trip because I like museums and we don’t often have lessons outside school.[/1]||[2]I’m going to take some sandwiches, an apple and a bottle of water for lunch.[/2]||[3]Yes, I’d like to sit next to you on the coach. We can listen to music or talk during the journey.[/3]||[4]I’m sorry, but I don’t think we should do the worksheet together because the teacher said everyone must write their own answers.[/4]||See you tomorrow,||Leo
